//: No-build type checking for the vanilla-JS app. `npm run typecheck` runs tsc --noEmit; the app itself never touches TypeScript and gains no runtime/build dependency (same posture as eslint). checkJs is OFF globally — a module opts IN by adding `// @ts-check` at its top, so we harden the well-tested pure kernels first and expand file-by-file without a flag day. strict is on (real null-safety + type-mismatch catching) but noImplicitAny is off so retrofitting doesn't require annotating every existing parameter.
